title: Escalating Geopolitical Tensions Dominated Global Markets
section_path: Escalating Geopolitical Tensions Dominated Global Markets
section_path_text: Escalating Geopolitical Tensions Dominated Global Markets
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
Escalating geopolitical tensions dominated global markets this week following coordinated military strikes by the U.S. The attacks, and the subsequent retaliatory actions, triggered a sharp reaction in energy markets and injected renewed volatility into global equities. Oil prices surged as concerns mounted over potential disruptions to supply routes, particularly through the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz, a passage that handles roughly one-fifth of global oil shipments.
